root.content: Grand comprehensive audit: map all lifecycles, pipelines, hooks, tools, libs, responsibilities, integration, user journeys — produce SOT audit report for consolidation plan

children.content: Grand audit planning: design multi-domain parallel scan strategy, define audit sectors, user journey scenarios, and delegation plan
Phase 1: Dispatching 4 parallel read-only scanner agents across independent audit domains (Architecture Layer, Schema/Data Model, Orchestration/Integration, Runtime State/Pipeline)
Phase 1 COMPLETE: 4 parallel scanner agents returned successfully. All findings saved to audit-findings shelf. Now synthesizing into SOT audit report (Phase 2-4 combined).

Phase 2-4 COMPLETE: SOT audit report synthesized and written to docs/plans/2026-02-23-grand-sot-audit-report.md (841 lines). 17 consolidated issues identified, 6 user journeys simulated, 5-phase consolidation roadmap produced. Now finalizing.

ALL PHASES COMPLETE: Grand SOT audit report finalized at docs/plans/2026-02-23-grand-sot-audit-report.md (841 lines). 17 consolidated issues, 6 user journeys, 5-phase consolidation roadmap. Ready for user review and next action decision.
